title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.540 - When creditors may defend
text:
521.540.  When creditors may defend. — In all suits by attachments, the court in which such suits are pending may, for the furtherance of justice, in its discretion, permit any person or persons who are creditors of the same defendant to appear in said suits on behalf of the defendant and make all such defenses as the defendant could make.
(RSMo 1939 § 1493) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1329; 1919 § 1780; 1909 § 2349
